$comment: Committed, secret-free machine-readable evidence snapshot + field map for the machine-governed LIVE_FACTS.json fields (TKT-273 / PLAN-012). Each entry maps a LIVE_FACTS JSON path to its evidenced value, the dated read-only evidence source, the read-only probe that reproduces it, and the comparison rule. Replace only from dated read-only evidence; never infer live state from source. LIVE_FACTS.json records this file's path and sha256 under authority.machineEvidence; scripts/checks/check-live-facts.mjs compares the two offline, and scripts/checks/live-facts-azure-compare.mjs re-mints it read-only against Azure when credentials are present. No secrets, tokens, connection strings, or private identifiers appear here.
evidenceBasis: Read-only ARM resource inventory of rg-collisionspike-dev (2026-07-19, TKT-257), the banked PLAN-009 read-only dossier and docs/operations/cloud-inventory-2026-07-17.md, and the tracked route count in services/functions/parser/function_app.py.

fields.probe: az functionapp function list -n cespk-api-dev -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
fields.evidenceSource: The 2026-07-17 inventory captured 146 raw function endpoints for cespk-api-dev; TKT-257 reconciled that to 144 registered application functions (the 146 markdown figure over-counts host/admin endpoints). live-environment.md's 2026-07-19 re-verification confirms 144.

fields.probe: az functionapp function list -n cespk-orch-dev -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
fields.evidenceSource: docs/operations/cloud-inventory-2026-07-17.md and the 2026-07-19 re-verification (105, up from 101 after the 2026-07-17 d6ee70de deploy).

fields.probe: az functionapp function list -n cespike-parser-dev-x7xt3d5ovhi7y -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
fields.evidenceSource: docs/operations/cloud-inventory-2026-07-17.md §6.1 lists five parser functions (classify, explode .eml, extract images, fingerprint, parse); services/functions/parser/function_app.py declares five @app.route handlers. Corrects the prior registry undercount of 4 (which no dated evidence supported).

fields.probe: az functionapp function list -n cespkbox-fn-v76a47 -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
az functionapp function list -n cespkeva-fn-ufa3ci -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
az functionapp function list -n cespkeval-fn-6c6fxd -g rg-collisionspike-dev -o json
fields.evidenceSource: docs/operations/cloud-inventory-2026-07-17.md; retained as the rollback guard (live retirement operator-gated, TKT-252).

fields.probe: read-only SQL against collisionspike: SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_type='BASE TABLE'
fields.evidenceSource: Database baseline plus the 2026-07-17 read-only inventory. Not reproducible from ARM alone (requires a read-only database connection); the offline check:database gate governs the schema itself.

docAuthority.rule: The human-readable view's 'last verified' date must equal the date part of LIVE_FACTS.lastVerified.
